title: CA Jobs 2026 – Professor, Accountant and More
shortInfo: National Institute of Ayurveda (NIA Jaipur & Panchkula) Recruitment 2026 for 49 posts of Professor. Candidates with Post-Graduate Degree, B.Sc, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 11-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIA Jaipur & Panchkula official website nia.nic.in.

The candidate shall apply online through NIA Jaipur & Panchkula official website nia.nic.in.

application_fee.details: Professor: Maximum Age: 55 Years (Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 Years, OBC: 3 Years, PH: 10 Years, Ex-Servicemen: 3 Years over and above the period of service rendered in Defence Service) Associate Professor: Maximum Age: 50 Years (Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 Years, OBC: 3 Years, PH: 10 Years, Ex-Servicemen: 3 Years over and above the period of service rendered in Defence Service) Assistant Professor: Maximum Age: 40 Years (Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 Years, OBC: 3 Years, PH: 10 Years, Ex-Servicemen: 3 Years over and above the period of service rendered in Defence Service) Medical Officer: Maximum Age: 40 Years (Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 Years, OBC: 3 Years, PH: 10 Years, Ex-Servicemen: 3 Years over and above the period of service rendered in Defence Service) Deputy Director(Admn. & Fin.): Maximum Age: 56 Years Accountant: Maximum Age: 30 Years (Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 Years, OBC: 3 Years, PH: 10 Years, Ex-Servicemen: 3 Years over and above the period of service rendered in Defence Service) Librarian: Maximum Age: 35 Years (Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 Years, OBC: 3 Years, PH: 10 Years, Ex-Servicemen: 3 Years over and above the period of service rendered in Defence Service) Panchakarma age_limit.age_details: Max: 55 Years for Professor, 50 Years for Associate Professor, 40 Years for Assistant Professor, 40 Years for Medical Officer, 56 Years for Deputy Director, 30 Years for Accountant and Nursing Officer, 35 Years for Librarian. Crucial Date: 20-06-2026.
age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIA Jaipur & Panchkula Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate Degree in Ayurveda, 15 Years Teaching Experience, Minimum 10 Research Publications, Working knowledge of Computer and AI.
qualification.details: Professor: Post-Graduate Degree in Ayurveda in the Subject concerned recognised under IMCC Act 1970/NCISM Act 2020. 15 Years Teaching Experience in the Subject concerned out of which 10 Years Post-Graduate Teaching Experience as Lecturer/Assistant Professor/Associate Professor/Reader or combined or 15 Years Research Experience in Research Councils/Universities/National Institutes/NABL Accredited Laboratories/CGHS/State Govt. Health Services/Ministry of Ayush. Minimum 10 Research Publications in Indexed Journals or Peer Reviewed Journals OR Minimum 10 Research Publications and Patents combined. Working knowledge of Computer and Artificial Intelligence. Basic Knowledge of GeM, GFRs, Office Procedures etc. Associate Professor: Post-Graduate Degree in Ayurveda in the Subject concerned recognized under IMCC Act, 1970/NCISM Act 2020. 10 Years Teaching Experience in the Subject concerned as Lecturer/Assistant Professor/Regular Ph.D. out of which 5 Years Post-Graduate Experience in the Subject concerned as Assistant Professor or 10 Years Research Experience in Research Councils/Universities/National Institutes/NABL Accredited Laboratories/CGHS/State Govt. Health Services/Ministry of Ayush. Minimum 7 Research Publications in Indexed Journals or Peer Reviewed Journals OR Minimum 7 Research Publications and Patents combined. Working knowledge of Computer and Artificial Intelligence. Basic Knowledge of GeM, GFRs, Office Procedures etc. Assistant Professor: PG Degree in Ayurveda in the Subject concerned recognized under IMCC Act 1970/NCISM Act 2020. Minimum 3 Research Publications in Indexed Journals or Peer Reviewed Journals OR Minimum 3 Research Publications and Patents combined. Desirable: 1. Ph.D. in the Subject concerned. 2. Working knowledge of Computers and Artificial Intelligence. Medical Officer: MD/MS(Ayurved) in the subject of Kayachikitsa/Panchkarma/Shalya Tantra/Shalakya Tantra/Prasuti & Stri Roag/Kaumarabhritya/Agad Tantra/Swasthvritta/Roga Nidana & Vikriti Vigyana from a recognized University and duly recognized by CCIM Act 1970/NCISM Act 2020. Desirable: 1 Minimum 3 Research Publications in Indexed Journals or Peer Reviewed Journals OR Minimum 3 Research Publications and Patents combined. 2 Working knowledge of Computers and Artificial Intelligence and Hospital Information System. Deputy Director(Admn. & Fin.): Officers of Central Govt.(or Central Govt./State Govt. or Union Territories) holding analogous Post OR Officers in Pay Level 10 having 3 Years Administrative Experience. Accountant: B. Com. OR MBA in Financial Management OR Chattered Accountant. Nursing Officer(Ayurveda): (i) B.Sc. Nursing (Ayush) from an Ayush recognized Institute/University. (ii) Registered in the respective State/Indian Ayush Nursing Council. OR (i) Diploma in Nursing & Pharmacy of Ayush and registered in the respective State/Indian Ayush Nursing Council. (ii) 2 Years experience on a Nursing Post in a minimum 25 bedded Hospital after acquiring the above professional qualification. Working knowledge of Computer, AI and Hospital Information System. Librarian: Bachelor Degree or higher Qualification in Library & Information Sciences from a recognized University. 2 Years Post-Qualification Experience. Working Knowledge of Computer and AI. Panchakarma Vaidya: MD(Ayurveda) in the Subject of Panchkarma from a recognized University and duly recognized by CCIM Act 1970/NCISM Act 2020. Desirable: 1 Minimum 3 Research Publications in Indexed Journals or Peer Reviewed Journals OR Minimum 3 Research Publications and Patents combined. 2 Working knowledge of Computers and Artificial Intelligence and Hospital Information System. Radiologist: MD in Radiology from a recognized University. OR MBBS & DNB Radiology of 2 Years Duration with 2 Years Experience in Radiology in at least a 50 Bedded Hospital. AND Registration with National Medical Commission and with Automic Energy Regulatory Board & ELORA. Desirable: 1. Minimum 3 Research Publications in Indexed Journals or Peer Reviewed Journals OR minimum 3 Research Publications and Patents combined. 2. Working knowledge of Computers and Artificial Intelligence. Jr. Translation Officer: Master's degree of a recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in English with Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with Hindi medium and English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of a examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with English medium and Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's Degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with Hindi and English as compulsory or elective subjects or either of the two as a medium of examination and the other as a compulsory or elective subject at degree level; AND Recognized Diploma or Certificate Course in Translation from Hindi to English and vice-versa or 2 years experience of Translation work from Hindi to English and vice-versa in Central or State Government Office, including Government of India Undertaking. Pharmacist: 1 Pass in 12th Standard from a Central/State Board of Education. 2 Diploma in Ayush Nursing & Pharmacy of not less than 3 Years duration including Internship from a recognised University with 1 Year relevant Experience. OR B. Pharma (Ayurved) from a recognised University. OR D. Pharma (Ayurved) from a recognised University with 2 Years relevant experience. 3 Working knowledge of Computer, AI and Hospital Information System.

salary_details.salary: Pay Level 13 (Rs. 1,23,100-2,15,900) for Professor, Pay Level 12 (Rs.78,800-2,09,200) for Associate Professor, Pay Level 10 (Rs.56,100-1,77,500) for Assistant Professor, Medical Officer, Panchakarma Vaidya, Radiologist, Pay Level 6 (Rs. 35,400-1,12,400) for Accountant and Jr. Translation Officer, Pay Level 7 (Rs.44,900-1,42,400) for Nursing Officer and Librarian, Pay Level 11 (Rs.67,700-2,08,700) for Deputy Director.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIA Jaipur & Panchkula to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for NIA Jaipur & Panchkula Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NIA Jaipur & Panchkula Recruitment 2026 is 20 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in the NIA Jaipur & Panchkula Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 49 vacancies available for various posts, including Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, and others.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for the Professor post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Professor post is a Post-Graduate Degree in Ayurveda in the concerned subject, along with 15 years of teaching experience and a minimum of 10 research publications.

faq.question: What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC applicants varies depending on the post. For Professor and Associate Professor posts, it is Rs. 5,000. For Assistant Professor, Medical Officer, Panchakarma Vaidya, and Radiologist, it is Rs. 4,000. For other posts, it is Rs. 3,000.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor post is 40 years, with age relaxations applicable for SC/ST, OBC, PH, and Ex-Servicemen categories.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes Preliminary Tests, a Mains Examination, and an Interview.

faq.question: Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from all over India are eligible to apply, provided they meet the specified eligibility criteria for the respective posts.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Professor post?
faq.answer: The Professor post is offered a salary in Pay Level 13, which ranges from Rs. 1,23,100 to Rs. 2,15,900, plus NPA and other allowances.

faq.question: Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), PH (10 years), and Ex-Servicemen (3 years over and above service period) categories.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, or directly from the official website of the National Institute of Ayurveda.
